title: Fan Yin
text:
I am a PhD student at the Berlin School of Economics and Humboldt University. I obtained my Master’s (Economics) and Bachelor’s (Sociology) studies in University of Heidelberg. My interests are in spatial economics, urban economics, and economic history.
If you’d like to chat or grab a coffee, feel free to reach out anytime!

Contact
